Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Click to Choose Corner Shape ▼

Choose either ROUND corners or SQUARE corners for your product.

SQ

SQUARE Corners

RD

ROUND Corners

Copy Change ▼

Up to 10 copy changes available at standard pricing. Please contact us for a quote on 11 or more copy changes. Select the number of additional changes and use the Choices text box to type in instructions. If you have different copy for the same product, you may group the copy changes on the same order. <strong>NOTE:</strong> There is only 1 copy change charge no matter how many colors change if printing is in full color (four color process). <font color="b31b34"><strong>Published minimum quantities for all products apply for copy changes. Copy Changes are limited to changing 6 lines of copy, a photo and a logo. In addition, the items must all have a common background or main layout that does not change.</strong></font> <i>Please Note: Once an order is submitted to factory, copy changes cannot be added.</i> <hr>

9006

Proof Options ▼

9ONLINE

Internet Color Proof

Online Proofing is to show you color and/or color breaks, but IS NOT an exact color matching proofing system. Output from laser printers, ink-jet printers or what you view on your computer monitor cannot be matched. These methods are subjective and may not accurately represent your final printed product.

9DIGITAL

Digital Press Proof

Color press proofs are a close representation of the color of your product. Press proofs are available on four-color process items. Please note that wall calendar/booklet digital press proof sheets are printed on a digital press. The final product may be printed on a conventional press, therefore, a 5% difference in color, contrast and saturation may occur. This proof will not be trimmed, stapled, UV-coated, or feature a heavy cover. <strong>Press proofs are sent via overnight shipping at customer's expense. If you do not want your proofs expedited, please contact Customer Service. Note pads not available for this service.</strong>

$30.00 each

9002

Production Proof

Actual printed & laminated product proofs. Pre-Production Proofs for Wall Calendar/Booklet Pre-Production Proof are printed on a digital press. The final product may be printed on a conventional press, therefore, a 5% difference in color, contrast and saturation may occur.<strong>Product proofs are sent via overnight shipping at customer's expense. If you do not want your proofs expedited, please contact Customer Service. Printed product proofs & shipping are FREE OF CHARGE on orders of $6,250(G) or more. Pantone® color matches are billed at $50(C) per color on all product proofs.</strong>

$80.00 each

Magnet Strip (1/2 in. x 2 in.) ▼

One magnet strip attached at the top.

9MAG1

Double Stick Tape (1 piece) ▼

One piece of double stick tape per unit attached.

9DS1

Hole Drilling (No Charge) ▼

One hole drilled at top at no charge.

9DRILL

Mail Services ▼

<hr><font color="b31b34"><strong>United States Postal Service (USPS) postal pricing can vary dependent upon the selections made below. USPS mail rates are subject to change without advance notice.:</strong></font>

TNNOMS

NO MAIL SERVICES - HAND OUT ONLY

<strong>By selecting this option you acknowledge that you do not need an indicia or inkjet addressing and no mailing list will be sent or processed.</strong>

TN1SP

Use First Class Single Piece Method (non presort)

First Class Single Piece Retail Mail (First Class Single Piece Retail Mail receives expeditious handling and transportation. Service objectives for delivery are 1 to 3 days upon entry to the USPS; however, delivery time is not guaranteed.) <strong>Postal regulations require 200 piece minimum for Single Piece Retail Mail Method.</strong>

TN1ST

Use Presorted First Class Method

Presorted First Class Mail (First-Class Mail receives expeditious handling and transportation. Service objectives for delivery are 1 to 3 days upon entry to the USPS; however, delivery time is not guaranteed.) <strong>Postal regulations require 500 piece minimum for presorted method.</strong>

TNMM

Use Presorted Marketing Mail Method

Presorted Marketing Mail (Formerly Presorted Standard/3rd Class -- Marketing Mail may receive deferred handling. Service objectives for delivery are 2 to 9 days upon entry to the USPS; however, delivery time is not guaranteed.).<strong>Postal regulations require 200 piece minimum.</strong>

TNNPF

Use Non-Profit Class Method

Presorted Non-Profit Class Mail (Standard Non-Profit Mail may receive deferred handling. Service objectives for delivery are 2 to 9 days upon entry to the USPS; however, delivery time is not guaranteed.). <strong> Postal regulations require 200 piece minimum.</strong> MUST MEET CERTAIN USPS CRITERIA. USPS FORM 3623, SIGNED BY ORGANIZATION OFFICIAL (<a href="http://pe.usps.gov" target="_blank">http://pe.usps.gov</a>). Document may be faxed to 866-264-4223 or emailed to mailservices@tradenetpublishing.com

TNOCRYES

Add "Or Current Resident"

By adding "Or Current Resident" your mail piece(s) will more fully comply with the USPS Move/Update Requirements regarding mail deliverability, By NOT adding "Or Current Resident", your list will need to be processed through NCOA (National Change of Address) and require and additional charge. If not adding "Or Current Resident" please select the TNOCRNO option.

TNOCRNO

NCOA (National Change Of Address)

The USPS requires a NCOA PAF postal form be signed and returned to Mail Services at mailservices@tradenetpublishing.com.. Please contact Mailservices for the form.

$80.00 each

TNNCOA-DIST

NCOA Summary Report provided by distributor

TNANC

Ancillary Service Endorsement

Please contact Mail Services for additional information at 800-884-7301 extension 3

TNNCI

Mail Pieces - No Customer's Indicia

Ship printed items BULK via FedEx or common carrier using customers account number (3rd Party. Additional fees may apply) By selecting this option I acknowledge that I understand that postcard stamp rates are unavailable for this product and I will consult with my local USPS office for mailing this item at a First Class Stamp rate. Stamps and metered mail can only be placed in the upper right hand corner of the mail piece.

TNWCI

Mail Pieces With Customer's Indicia

Ship printed items BULK via FedEx or common carrier using customers account number (Collect or 3rd Party. Additional fees may apply) The indicia for the mailing location is included as part of my artwork, (To sort properly and meet postal regulations, we require you to furnish the permit number along with the company name, contact name, phone number, address, city, state and zip code of the location from where the mailing will be sent.) When selecting this option NCOA processing or the addition of "Or Current Resident" is required.

TN1STMTR

Use First class retail metered mail

By selecting this option you are acknowledging that the pieces are to be mailed at the current USPS applicable 1st class metered mail postage rate. This selection has additional charges that apply for this service.

Ink-Jet Printed Addresses ▼

Mailing lists supplied on CD or via e-mail must be in PC ­compatible ASCII, DBF, Excel or CSV Files, with name, address, city, state and zip code each in its own field. <strong>Postage is additional.</strong>

9INKJET

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Laminated Die-Cut Postcard (8.5x5.25) w/Detachable Card (3.375x2.125) - 24 PT. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 262403X on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 7 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 100 units (per catalog line).
